questions.student_answer: My favorite holiday is Christmas. I love it because I get to spend time with my family and receive presents. We decorate the tree and have a big dinner. I also enjoy singing carols and watching the snow fall. It is a very special time of the year.
questions.justification: The student provided a well-structured, coherent paragraph that fully addresses the prompt with appropriate grammar, vocabulary, and detail, meeting all criteria for full-mark requirements.

questions.student_answer: My favorite animal is the dog. I love dogs because they are loyal and friendly. They are great companions and always happy to see you. I have a golden retriever named Max who is very playful and loves to go for walks. Dogs are wonderful pets.
questions.justification: The student provided a coherent, well-structured paragraph that directly addresses the prompt with relevant details and correct grammar.

questions.student_answer: My favorite food is pizza. I love pizza because it is delicious and comes in many flavors. I enjoy eating pepperoni and cheese pizza. I also like to add vegetables like mushrooms and onions. Pizza is a fun food to eat with friends and family.
questions.justification: The student provided a coherent, grammatically correct paragraph that directly addresses the prompt with relevant details about their favorite food.

questions.justification: The response is a coherent narrative that addresses the prompt but lacks the descriptive detail, vocabulary, and structural complexity required for higher marks in a 15-mark question.

questions.student_answer: A good friend is a person with whom you share everything. He does not betray you when you share secrets. The good friend is always there to assist when in need. He thinks about you when there is an opportunity of promotion or a chance for development. A good friend will always be by your side in difficulties and in good times. He suffers with you and rejoices with you.
questions.justification: The student provides four distinct and relevant characteristics (loyalty/confidentiality, supportiveness, altruism, and shared joy/sorrow) with clear explanations, demonstrating a solid understanding of the topic, though the depth of analysis is somewhat limited compared to the high mark allocation.
